settings.heading: Workshop
settings.subtext: From routine servicing to performance builds, engine conversions and full restorations, we look after all makes and models with honest advice and quality workmanship.

settings.title: Servicing
settings.text: Keep your car running right with scheduled log book and general servicing. We follow the manufacturer's schedule so your new car warranty stays intact, and give you a straight rundown of anything that needs attention.
settings.features: Log book & general servicing | Warranty-safe, manufacturer schedule | All makes and models | Clear, upfront pricing

settings.title: Performance Upgrades
settings.text: Get more out of your car with the right upgrades for the way you drive. From bolt-ons to tuning and supporting mods, we put together a package that is reliable, streetable and does what you actually want.
settings.features: Bolt-on upgrades & tuning | Intake, exhaust & cooling | Reliable, streetable setups | Built to your goals & budget

settings.title: Engine Builds & Rebuilds
settings.text: Full engine builds and rebuilds done properly, from worn-out daily drivers to serious performance builds. Measured, assembled and set up to spec so it lasts and performs the way it should.
settings.features: Full builds & rebuilds | Performance & standard specs | Precise, measured assembly | Built to last

settings.title: Engine Conversions
settings.text: Dropping a different engine into your project? We handle conversions end to end, from mounts and wiring to cooling and tuning, so the swap runs clean, safe and reliable.
settings.features: Complete engine swaps | Mounts, wiring & plumbing | Cooling & fuelling sorted | Tuned and road-ready

settings.title: Restoration
settings.text: Bringing an old or unfinished project back to life. Mechanical restoration done with care and patience so your car looks, drives and feels the way it was meant to.
settings.features: Full & partial restorations | Mechanical rebuilds | Careful, patient workmanship | Project cars welcome

settings.title: Our Core Services
settings.lead: This is what Niche is built around - performance work, engine builds, conversions and restorations - all done in-house with honest advice and fair, upfront pricing.
settings.strip_sub: Tell us the make, model and what's going on, and we'll point you the right way.

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.
